**Caption:** Fall colours go really well with Kyoto’s landscape. 

1. Shinnyo do temple
2. Daigo-ji temple
3.Kiyomizu-dear temple

4. I forgot 🤔

6&7 Yusaitei 
8. Yokoku-ji temple
9. Arashiyama

#hellofrom Kyoto

```json
    "full_address": "Kiyomizu-dera, 1-294 Kiyomizu-1-chome, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto, 605-8262, Japan",
    "order": 3
  },
  {
    "name": "Jingo-ji temple",
    "full_address": "Jingo-ji, 364 Jingo-cho, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto, 605-8261, Japan",
    "order": 5
  },
  {
    "name": "Yusaitei",
    "full_address": "Yusaitei, 58-11, Kitanochō, Ukyō-ku, Kyoto, 616-8347, Japan",
    "order": 6
  },
  {
    "name": "Yokoku-ji temple",
    "full_address": "10 Yokoku-ji, Otokuni-cho, Higashiyama-ku, Kyoto-shi, Kyoto 605-8302, Japan",
    "order": 8
  },
  {
    "name": "Arashiyama",
    "full_address": "Arashiyama, Arashiyama Genji, Nishiki-ku, Kyoto, 616-8301, Japan",
    "order": 9
  },
  {
    "name": "Iwato Ochiba jinja",
    "full_address": "58-11 Kitanochō, Ukyō-ku, Kyoto, 616-8347, Japan",
    "order": 10
  }
]
```

I hope this is helpful!
